notes: cat.blend is the editable master rig source with control widgets and metarig data.
master-cat.glb is the cleaned runtime export containing only the skinned cat mesh and rig armature.
The source file currently contains no baked Action animations; reuse the existing maomao#0001 animation library for motion retargeting.
glTF export clamps vertex skinning to the top 4 joint influences per vertex, which is expected for browser runtime compatibility.
